HEARING RE: DEFENDANT VASILY MIKHAYLOV's Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement.

Matter argued and submitted.

The Court rules as follows: Defendant Vasily Mikaylov's motion for determination of good faith settlement is denied without prejudice. The moving party may re-file the motion when the indispensible parties discussed by the Court and counsel have been added into this case.
